title: At Journey's End, We Meet
overview: Young aristocrat Albert visits the city of Luna on the surface of the moon. He quickly falls under the spell of an enigmatic gentleman - the Count of Monte Cristo.

title: Until the Sun Rises over the Moon
overview: Albert is kidnapped! Franz's frantic attempt to collect the ransom money comes up short, so he warily seeks the assistance of the Count of Monte Cristo.

title: 5/22, Stormy
overview: Back in Paris, Albert's sheltered friends grow suspicious upon the arrival of the mysterious Count of Monte Cristo.

title: A Mother's Secrets
overview: The questions surrounding the Count multiply when Albert visits the man's lavish mansion in Champs Elysees, which is filled with complicated tricks and gold ornaments.

title: Do You Love Your Fiancee?
overview: During a pleasure cruise arranged by the Count, a disagreement leads to a duel between Albert and Maximilien. Albert's raw emotions allow his host to grasp even more sway over his destiny.

title: Her Melancholy, My Melancholy
overview: The Count of Monte Cristo positions himself deeper into the lives of those around Albert after meeting a banker and his frustrated wife.

title: The Secret Flower Garden
overview: The lives of Albert's aristocratic friends are full of secrets - and the Count is among those prone to whispering in the ears of ladies known to be spoken for.

title: A Night in Boulogne
overview: At a party thrown by the Count, the guests play a game. They search for a secret room in the villa where a curse is sealed away. Albert has already discovered one secret kept between the Count and Heloise.

title: I Dreamed a Dark Dream
overview: The charms of the Count are fading for some, as mysteries and suspicions multiply. The controversy surrounding the mysterious man can only grow when a hidden poisoner begins to ply their trade.

title: The Letter from Edmond
overview: Villefort, Danglars, and Morcerf are invited to a funeral. Albert suspects something is wrong and follows them to an old church, where the lid of the casket is about to be opened.

title: An Engagement Broken
overview: Three aristocratic households are growing aware that they are caught in a conspiracy. Franz immediately suspects the Count, but Albert won't hear of it.

title: Encore
overview: Albert's engagement is in jeopardy; Baron Dangler prefers his daughter to marry into wealth. Albert rushes to the opera house to find Eugenie - but the curtain may have already closed on his love.

title: Haidee
overview: Attorney General Villefort demands the arrest of the Count of Monte Cristo, but Heloise takes steps to prevent it from happening.

title: Lost Souls
overview: After the announcement of Eugenie and Andrea's engagement leaves Albert feeling betrayed, the Count appears and invites him on a journey deep into the universe.

title: The End of Happiness, the Beginning of Truth
overview: Aboard his spaceship, the Count of Monte Cristo tells Albert about an old friend who was betrayed and imprisoned. Back home, Franz is close to learning an important secret.

title: Scandal
overview: Closing in on the secret of the Gankutsuou, Franz learns of a sailor named Edmond Dantes who had strange connections to many of the families in Parisian high society.

title: Confession
overview: After the Count reveals a shocking truth, Albert is left shattered when Franz explains a horrible and twisted story of revenge.

title: The Duel
overview: Mercedes enters the misty woods to meet the Count - but only a scene of violence is waiting for her.

title: Even If I Should Stop Being Me
overview: The Count escalates his plan for revenge, launching a bitter blow at his next target, the Danglars Bank. The impact will be felt by many - including Albert.

title: Farewell, Euganie
overview: Being rescued from danger by Chateau-Renaud, Albert learns about Eugenie's marriage and rushes over to the Danglars' home.

title: The Golden Boy's True Identity
overview: An abominable memory, consigned to the darkness of the past, has been resurrected by the hands of the Count and his plan of revenge enters its final stage.

title: Counterattack
overview: The final target of the Count's rage returns to Earth and the bombardment of Paris begins!

title: Edmond Dantes
overview: Albert and Mercedes are seriously wounded as Fernand prepares for his final showdown with the Count of Monte Cristo.

title: At the Shore
overview: Five years later, Albert returns to Paris to visit the relics of his former life and the grave of a dear friend.
